final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum exhibition infographic for Chinese ethnic minority costume, designed for national museum display panels with the restrained dignity of scholarly textile documentation.

Style/medium: museum exhibition infographic with the archival precision of a national heritage textile catalog, printed on matte rice paper with the quiet authority of institutional scholarship
Composition: fixed five-zone layout — top header banner, left structural dissection zone with leader lines to close-ups, upper-right material/texture sample grid, middle-right pattern/color symbolism panel, bottom wearing-sequence flowchart with core characteristics summary; central hero subject anchors the visual field
Subject: full-figure standing person wearing authentic Yi ethnic minority traditional attire (凉山彝族盛装), or alternatively a central dissection diagram if object-focused; costume structure includes: 头帕/银饰头冠, 右衽大襟衣, 百褶长裙, 绣花围腰, 银饰项链/手镯, 绑腿/绣花鞋; each component labeled with Chinese leader lines and close-up insets
Scene/backdrop: warm rice paper texture (米白/绢纸白/浅茶色) with subtle archival aging, the quiet museum lighting of a climate-controlled exhibition hall
Lighting/mood: the soft, even illumination of museum conservation lighting, respectful and studious, allowing textile details to speak without drama
Color palette: muted archival tones — warm rice paper beige, ink black for annotations, indigo and crimson from the costume itself, restrained accent of oxidized silver; the palette of scholarly documentation
Materials/textures: hand-woven woolen cloth with visible weave structure, indigo-dyed cotton with slight color variation, hammered silver ornaments with patina, embroidered silk threads with raised texture, wax-resist batik patterns
Text (verbatim): 主标题：彝族传统服饰结构图鉴；副标题：凉山彝族盛装·非物质文化遗产；导语：彝族服饰以黑、红、黄为主色，象征土地、火焰与祖先；结构标注：头帕、银饰、大襟衣、百褶裙、围腰、绑腿、绣花鞋；材质说明：火草麻、羊毛毡、蜡染布、银饰锻打；纹样寓意：羊角纹象征繁衍，火镰纹代表光明，蕨菜纹寓意生生不息；色彩含义：黑色为大地与尊贵，红色为火焰与勇敢，黄色为祖先与丰收；核心特征总结：尚黑贵左、银饰繁复、百褶层叠、刺绣精美
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and legible at reading distance; layout must follow the five-zone structure exactly; museum-quality realism without poster or commercial aesthetics; accurate ethnic costume structure; professional exhibition panel proportions
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photography look, e-commerce product page styling, anime or illustration style, cosplay appearance, incorrect structural labels, blurry or garbled text, English or pinyin, fake materials, excessive decoration, Instagram-friendly filters, romanticized fantasy styling
